summary:
Lane 2: Timeline Inspector UI — complete.

Created the full inspector infrastructure for the desktop app:

## Files Created (6 new files)

1. **packages/app/src/context/inspector.tsx** — Inspector context provider that:
   - Subscribes to ALL SDK events via `sdk.event.on("*", handler)`
   - Normalizes events into `RuntimeEvent` objects with category, status, tool, file, actor, etc.
   - Caps at 10,000 events in-memory
   - Provides filtering (by category, status, tool, file, session, actor, time range)
   - Provides event correlation (parent/child by callID)
   - Provides stats (counts by type, category, errors)
   - Exports useInspector() and InspectorProvider via createSimpleContext

2. **packages/app/src/components/inspector/inspector-page.tsx** — Page layout:
   - Three-panel layout: session sidebar | timeline | detail drawer
   - Green/red connection status bar
   - Footer stats bar
   - Wraps in AppErrorBoundary and InspectorProvider

3. **packages/app/src/components/inspector/timeline-table.tsx** — Virtual-scrolling event table:
   - Columns: timestamp | event type | actor | tool | file | status | duration | error
   - Sortable by timestamp (descending)
   - Click-to-select opens detail drawer
   - Color-coded status badges
   - Empty state with helpful message
   - Virtual scrolling via scroll container with overscan

4. **packages/app/src/components/inspector/timeline-filters.tsx** — Filter bar:
   - Quick filters: Errors only, Tool calls, File edits
   - Category filter buttons (11 categories with icons)
   - Status filter buttons
   - Time range buttons (5m/15m/1h/6h/24h/All)
   - Search inputs for tool name, file path, actor
   - Clear filters button

5. **packages/app/src/components/inspector/event-detail-drawer.tsx** — Detail panel:
   - Event summary header with icon, type, status badge
   - Structured fields (session, tool, file, error, callID)
   - Parent event link (clickable to navigate)
   - Child events list (clickable)
   - Fields tab (recursive JSON viewer with depth limit)
   - Raw JSON tab (formatted JSON)
   - Empty state hint

6. **packages/app/src/components/inspector/session-list.tsx** — Session sidebar:
   - Lists all sessions seen in events
   - Sorted by most recent activity
   - Shows event count per session
   - Click to filter timeline to that session
   - Active session highlighted

## Files Modified (1 file)

7. **packages/app/src/app.tsx** — Added:
   - Import for InspectorPage component
   - Route at `/inspector` under the `/:dir` group route

## Key Design Decisions

- Inspector has its OWN event subscription (via `sdk.event.on("*")`), separate from session-viz
- Event categorization maps 70+ event types into 11 user-friendly categories
- Event correlation uses `callID` to link tool.called → tool.success/failed/progress
- No modifications to existing components (session-viz is untouched)
- Follows existing codebase patterns: createSimpleContext, Tailwind-like CSS, SolidJS signals/stores
- Zero new type errors (all pre-existing errors are in test files and untracked export-button.tsx)

## Deferred

- Specialized sub-views: Tool Calls breakdown, Files Changed list, Permission audit, MCP dashboard
- Session diff comparison
- Export/import of event logs
- Session replay
